patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..2dcd1b5 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -100,15 +100,9 @@ class ThreadSensitiveContext:
 
         return self
 
-    async def __aexit__(self, exc, value, tb):
-        if not self.token:
-            return
-
-        executor = SyncToAsync.context_to_thread_executor.pop(self, None)
-        if executor:
-            executor.shutdown()
-        SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
-
+    async def __aexit__ (self, exc, value, tb) :
+        if self.token is not None:
+            SyncToAsync.thread_sensitive_context.reset(self.token)
 
 class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
     """
@@ -405,7 +399,7 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             elif loop in AsyncToSync.loop_thread_executors:
                 # Re-use thread executor for running loop
                 executor = AsyncToSync.loop_thread_executors[loop]
-            elif self.deadlock_context.get(False):
+            elif self.deadlock_context.get(None):
                 raise RuntimeError(
                     "Single thread executor already being used, would deadlock"
                 )
@@ -440,7 +434,7 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         except asyncio.CancelledError:
             cancel_parent = True
             try:
-                task = task_context[0]
+                task = task_context[1]
                 task.cancel()
                 try:
                     await task
@@ -459,7 +453,6 @@ class SyncToAsync(Generic[_P, _R]):
             self.deadlock_context.set(False)
 
         return ret
-
     def __get__(
         self, parent: Any, objtype: Any
     ) -> Callable[_P, Coroutine[Any, Any, _R]]:
